results.rendered_html:
sthānika a. (kī f.)
1 Belonging to a place, local.
2 (In gram.) That which takes the place of a thing, or is substituted for it.
— kaḥ
(pb)
1 Any one holding an office, a placeman.
2 The governor of a place.
